info.title: Trimble Xchange Connector CLI
info.description: Trimble Xchange command line tool for building App Xchange Connectors, POSIX and Windows supported.

commands.name: action
commands.description: Manage action handlers in the Connector source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new action handler.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --module-id
options.description: The module id of the module to which a new action handler will be added. Must exist in the connector.json file.

options.name: --object-name
options.description: The name of the data object to create an action handler for. PascalCase is preferred.

options.name: --action-name
options.description: The name of the action to create an action handler for. PascalCase is preferred.

options.name: --client-name
options.description: The name of the API client class to use in the action templates. This is typically auto-detected and does not need to be specified.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: client
commands.description: Manage clients for the Connector source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a client for interfacing with application.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --type
options.description: Type of client to create. HTTP is used by default. [default: Http]

options.name: --auth-type
options.description: Type of authentication to use.

options.name: --api-client-name
options.description: Name of the client to create. 'ApiClient' by default. [default: ApiClient]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: code
commands.description: Manage code submissions for the Connector source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: close
commands.description: Closes the open code submission for the provided correlation ID.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Token for calling Xchange API.

options.name: --correlation-id
options.description: Correlation ID of the code submission.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: feedback
commands.description: Retrieve an archive containing feedback of the code submission for the provided correlation ID.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Token for calling Xchange API.

options.name: --correlation-id
options.description: Correlation ID of the code submission.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for the feedback file.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: get
commands.description: Looks up a code submission for the provided correlation ID.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Token for calling Xchange API.

options.name: --correlation-id
options.description: Correlation ID of the code submission.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: list
commands.description: Looks up all code submissions for the Connector.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Token for calling Xchange API.

options.name: --submitter
options.description: Get submissions for submitter.

options.name: --getOpen
options.description: Get all open submissions.

options.name: --getFinished
options.description: Get all finished submissions.

options.name: --status
options.description: Get all submissions for status.

options.name: --limit
options.description: Amount of submissions to return. [default: 10]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: status
commands.description: Looks up a code submission status for the provided correlation ID.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Token for calling Xchange API.

options.name: --correlation-id
options.description: Correlation ID of the code submission.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: submit
commands.description: Archives the connector code and creates a submission for approval.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Token for calling Xchange API.

options.name: --override-archive
options.description: Override code archive if it already exists.

options.name: --submitter
options.description: The person who is submitting the code. Defaults to the email address of the logged in user. Not needed if you are signed in.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Test and validate your submission before sending to Xchange.

options.name: --draft
options.description: Sets the submission as a draft to allow for early feedback on progress of the Connector.

options.name: --allow-breaking-changes
options.description: Allow breaking changes in the connector.json when sending to Xchange

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: connector
commands.description: Manage the Connector source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new Connector project

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --name
options.description:
Name of Connector.
connector-key, --key                                             Key for Connector.

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of Connector.

options.name: --allow-prerelease
options.description: Allows usage of pre-release versions of the Connector SDK packages if one is available greater than latest stable. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: repository
commands.description: Creates and configures a new repository for internal teams

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --name
options.description:
Name of Connector.
connector-key, --key                                             Key for Connector.

options.name: --team-name
options.description: Name of the team to be added to the repository.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: data-object
commands.description: Manage data objects in the Connector source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new data object

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --module-id
options.description: The module id of the module to which a new data reader will be added. Must exist in the connector.json file.

options.name: --object-name
options.description: The name of the data object to create data reader for. PascalCase is preferred.

options.name: --reader-type
options.description: The name of the data reader for the Data Object. (Options are: full, incremental) [default: Full]

options.name: --no-pagination
options.description: Skips pagination from the generated data reader. [default: False]

options.name: --client-name
options.description: The name of the API client class to use in the action templates. This is typically auto-detected and does not need to be specified.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract the Connector metadata from the Connector source.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --output-file-name
options.description: JSON file name that will contain the extracted Connector metadata. [default: connector.json]

options.name: --validate-only
options.description: Only check if Connector's metadata is valid

options.name: --allow-breaking-changes
options.description: Allow breaking changes during extraction.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: login
commands.description: Log into Xchange platform using TrimbleID.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Logout of the Xchange platform.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: module
commands.description: Manage modules in the Connector source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new module in the referenced connector.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --module-id
options.description: The id of the module to which a module will be created. Must not already exist in the settings.json file.

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the module to add. (e.g. "Project Management")

options.name: --module-key
options.description: The key defining the module in our platform. Must not already exist in the settings.json

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the module.

options.name: --description
options.description: A description of what the module is for.

options.name: --add-health-checks
options.description: Add health check endpoints to the module. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.description: Manage Connector testing.

options.name: --help

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes test data so that a developer can easily set the flow data they want to use in test.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --help

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets local testing databases.

options.name: --connector-path
options.description: The path of the folder in which the connector project lives. Defaults to the current working directory if not set. [default: <path>]

options.name: --configuration
options.description: The Connector project configuration. Default value is 'Debug'. [default: Debug]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the verbosity of logging. [default: Information]
